title: Rat Pack revs up for SPCA fundraiser
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Motorcycle enthusiasts and animal lovers are invited to join the Rat Pack Motorcycle Club for a fun-filled day in support of the Garden Route SPCA.


> The Petrun charity ride takes place on Saturday 30 August; the bikers meet at the Sasol Garage on the N2, just past the Garden Route Mall, at noon.


From there, they will make their way to the Lions Club on York Street.

Entry is just R80 and includes a badge, a boerie roll and a lucky draw ticket.

The SPCA is currently in need of blankets, pet food and cash donations, and all support is welcome.

An extra drop-off point for donations has been set up at Landy World, 21 Foundry Road, for those who can't attend the ride but still want to contribute.

Enquiries: Tinus on 072 626 2062.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
